case_title: CAROLINE C. BARR VS. FUMIKO HOZUMI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO PRESERVE EXHIBITS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARR, CAROLINE C.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED DEC-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOZUMI, FUMIKO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2008 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-30-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-30-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. PROOF OF SERVICE NOT IN FILE, BUT WAS FILED ON DECEMBER 24, 2008 PER THE ROA. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY BARR, CAROLINE C. AS TO DEFENDANT HOZUMI, FUMIKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARR, CAROLINE C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOZUMI, FUMIKO $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOZUMI, FUMIKO
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BARR, CAROLINE C.
